summary: Completed code review verification of Practice Better v2 refactoring. All 12 refactoring items verified via code analysis and API testing. Fixed 2 bugs found during testing: (1) inline httpx import shadowing module-level import causing UnboundLocalError, (2) HTTPException not being re-raised causing 500 instead of 409.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ VERIFIED: Auth retries separated from transient retries (max_auth_retries=1, max_retries=2)
✅ VERIFIED: 429 backoff uses config (retry_429_base_delay=10.0) instead of hardcoded values
✅ VERIFIED: search_client_by_email uses _request not raw HTTP
✅ VERIFIED: asyncio.gather for concurrent availability fetching with Semaphore(3)
✅ VERIFIED: Cache key includes practitioner hash
✅ VERIFIED: consultant_name gets actual name (firstName/lastName), email is fallback only
✅ VERIFIED: Duration units documented (minutes for TimeSlot, seconds for BookingResult)
✅ VERIFIED: Inline imports moved to module level
seed_data_creation: None - using unique test emails with timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 refactoring items from code review verified. Two bugs fixed during testing: (1) Removed inline 'import httpx' at booking.py:492 that shadowed module-level import causing UnboundLocalError on httpx.HTTPStatusError, (2) Added 'except HTTPException: raise' handler to prevent HTTPExceptions from being caught by generic Exception handler. Concurrent availability fetch confirmed working (~1.3s for 6 consultants vs ~6s sequential).

bugs_fixed.issue: Inline 'import httpx' inside nested try block shadowed module-level import, causing UnboundLocalError when outer except block tried to catch httpx.HTTPStatusError
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed inline import since httpx is already imported at module level

bugs_fixed.issue: HTTPException raised inside try block (e.g., slot not found at line 409) was caught by generic 'except Exception' handler, returning 500 instead of 409
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'except HTTPException: raise' handler before httpx.HTTPStatusError handler to re-raise HTTPExceptions without wrapping

features_tested.GET /api/booking/health: PASS - Returns healthy status with 6 active consultants
features_tested.GET /api/booking/availability: PASS - Returns 440 slots in ~1.3s (concurrent fetch working)
features_tested.Code: auth_retries_separated: PASS - max_auth_retries=1, attempt -= 1 on auth failure
features_tested.Code: search_client_uses_request: PASS - Uses self._request not raw httpx
